title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, discusses Fable's capabilities and AI-native product development in a podcast interview. He describes how working with Fable changes the development workflow and explains Anthropic's safety warnings as substantive rather than marketing-driven. The episode covers Anthropic's dual role as both a platform and product company.
writeup: Mike Krieger, head of Anthropic Labs and Instagram co-founder, talks with Alex Kantrowitz about Fable's capabilities and how building AI-native products changes the development workflow. The conversation frames Anthropic's safety warnings as substantive rather than marketing-driven, and addresses the company's dual identity as both a platform and a product company. The interest here is Krieger's vantage point on shipping products on top of models while the same organization develops those models.
